title: The King Kong That Appeared in Edo
actors: Eizaburô Matsumoto, Fuminori Ôhashi, Reizaburo Ichikawa
plot: In part one of this silent two-part film, an ape nicknamed King Kong by its master kidnaps the daughter of a wealthy man as part of a revenge plot by one of his lackeys. The story concludes in King Kong Appears in Edo: The Episode...
